pokemon:iron-thorns.name: Iron Thorns
pokemon:iron-thorns.summary: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.
Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.

form:iron-thorns.name: Iron Thorns
form:iron-thorns.summary: Iron Thorns form with Rock / Electric typing.
